abilities.description: CARDNAME becomes a copy of target permanent card in your graveyard until end of turn. Activate only if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.

effect.description: CARDNAME becomes a copy of target permanent card in your graveyard until end of turn. Activate only if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.
effect.name: Clone

abilities.target_prompt: Select target permanent card in your graveyard

replacements.description: CARDNAME enters tapped unless you control a Forest.
